response: Profile: A dedicated, organized, and leadership-oriented individual with 15+ years of experience in medical transcription, possessing strong knowledge of medical terminology across various specialties. Skilled in transcribing and editing using software platforms such as eClinicalWorks, Experity EMR, and MS Office. Demonstrated strong editing skills, attention to detail, and the ability to meet turnaround times. Proven experience in supervising teams, managing workflows, and maintaining high-quality output. A reliable, dependable professional with a passion for continuous learning and contributing to organizational success. Passionate about customer service, interpersonal skills, and team collaboration. Proficient in Word, Excel, Outlook, and electronic health records. Typing speed of 70-80 words per minute. Nationality: Indian. On Visit Visa.
